situational_context: Running comeback week 9 (61 days since May 3 restart, 13 runs completed). ACWR has swung from 1.35 (spike, June 14) to 0.72 (detraining, July 2) — a natural correction after Run #12's excessive 7.5 km / load-36 session on June 21. HRV weekly avg recovering: 33 to 36 over 8 days, now BALANCED. Training readiness 75, body battery 55. E-bike commuting remains primary modality with 2 sur site days per week. Run #14 (planned July 1) was skipped — likely life/baby constraints. No runs since Run #13 (June 28, 3.5 km). Weight 103.67 kg (last weigh-in June 21). Vitamin D retest overdue (was due July 2026). Priority: resume structured running this weekend to arrest detraining trend.

recommendations.text: ACWR is 0.72 (detraining, below 0.8 floor) — resume structured running this weekend. Run #14 on Sunday at 4 km Z2 rebuilds acute load toward 0.8+ ACWR band. Do not exceed 4 km or 135 bpm. Monitor tissue response post-run.
recommendations.measurable: ACWR >= 0.80 within 10 days; zero post-run pain >24h

recommendations.text: Vitamin D retest overdue (recommended for July 2026, 7 months since last test at 27 ng/mL). Running at 103 kg with suboptimal Vitamin D carries approximately 2x stress fracture risk. Schedule blood panel this week.
Protein intake averaging 115 g/day (1.1 g/kg) — below the 1.5 g/kg threshold for tissue repair during running comeback at high body weight. Prioritize protein at each meal to reach 150+ g/day.
recommendations.measurable: 7d average protein >= 140 g/day by next digest

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if ACWR remains below 0.8 for >7 more days despite resumed running
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 0.72 (detraining); structured running resumption should bring it back to 0.8-1.0 range

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV weekly avg drops below 34 ms (reversal of current positive trend)
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently improving (33 to 36 over 8 days); reversal would suggest recovery capacity compromised

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after a run triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: 5-day gap since last run; tissue readiness needs confirmation at 103 kg body weight
